user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "plain-attachment", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "Vietnamese", "demographic_group": "Vietnamese", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Nursery school, preschool", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Loves to wear superhero costumes"]}}

{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.

- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: slim-sheave
logs.text: it's easy to draw the line, we already have an excellent guide on what counts as a medical defect and what doesn't. Screening for defects doesn't magically open the floodgates to a white, male, aryan super race. And people can already abort based on sex, if you're in a backwards country that requires "good reason" for aborting then I'm sure you could make some shit up and still abort, but shock horror, that's not happening in any first world countries.

logs.name: indigo-occurrence
logs.text: I couldn't generate a list, but I know that the deaf community is pushing back against the idea of hearing loss as a disability.

logs.name: indigo-occurrence
logs.text: Wow, okay, seriously? That's a really messed up take. Framing medical defects like that is incredibly insensitive and deflects from the actual struggles people face. Aborting based on sex is a huge violation of autonomy and frankly, pretty barbaric. And to imply that people are fabricating reasons for abortion is just plain ignorant. @slim-sheave, you need to think about the impact of your words.

logs.name: obtuse-literal
logs.text: Seriously?! That's just awful. Saying deafness isn't a disability is incredibly insensitive and tones down people's actual struggles. And abortion is a huge deal, messing with someone's autonomy like that is messed up. @slim-sheave, you gotta think about what you're saying!

logs.name: rapid-human

And abortion is a deeply personal issue, no one should be able to make comments like that. logs.name: young-daemon
logs.text: Seriously? That's just plain insensitive. Saying someone's deafness isn't a disability is cutting off people's ability to understand how much struggle it entails. And abortion is a loaded issue, folks need to be able to have those kinds of conversations without being attacked. @speedy-depth, really think about what you're saying. It stings.

logs.name: slim-sheave
logs.text: Oh wow, okay, I guess I didn't realize it was so insensitive. I am so sorry @user moderator. That was really thoughtless of me. I didn't mean to cause any hurt. I'll definitely be more careful with my words going forward. Thanks for calling me out on it.

logs.name: indigo-occurrence
logs.text: Okay, yeah, apologies accepted. Bit much to take out on someone, I guess. Didn't mean to cause any offense. Appreciate the call back @user moderator. Gotta be mindful, right?
